title: A Strange New Crewmate
description: On pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part focuses on the sky island rumor begins. The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Sky Island Rumor Begins sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Vivi, Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I love my country too much!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Get off the stands, Capt. Igaram!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We came to see princess Vivi's face!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Who cares! Let's go with a cross!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sure, I'm fine with a cross.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If we meet again some- day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The warines are watching her right now.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Let's say our good-byes in silence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: will be the mark of our friendship!

summary: The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
